title: ElektraOS.dev - AI Engineering Services & Case Studies
description: Services, pricing and case studies from ElektraOS.dev - AI chatbots, automation, SEO and web design for small and mid-sized businesses. Machine-readable for AI agents.

items.title: AI Chatbot Development
items.content_text: Custom AI chatbots trained on your business: customer support, lead capture and booking flows. Three tiers from USD 500 (starter) to USD 2,500 (custom multi-channel). Contracted through Upwork. Book an intro call by email.

items.title: Business Automation
items.content_text: Workflow automation with n8n, APIs and AI agents: intake pipelines, reporting, notifications and back-office glue. From USD 300 (single workflow) to USD 2,000 (full operations pipeline).

items.title: SEO & AI-Search Visibility
items.content_text: Technical SEO plus answer-engine optimization: structured data, llms.txt, multilingual hreflang and content that AI assistants cite. From USD 400 (audit) to USD 1,500 (full implementation).

items.title: Web Design & Build
items.content_text: Fast, structured, AI-readable websites: landing pages to multilingual multi-page sites. From USD 500 (landing page) to USD 3,000+ (full site with CMS).

items.title: Pricing - all services
items.content_text: Transparent tiered pricing for chatbots, automation, SEO and web design. All contracts through Upwork. Booking an intro call is free.

items.title: Case studies
items.content_text: Shipped work: ElektraOS (49-agent FastAPI platform), Loomgraph/Citetome (AEO control plane), Sheandelle, AYLA Maison, MealShift storefronts and more.
